privileged_info_summary: The increase_saturation task is a GIMP image editing task with ID 'increase_saturation@1' (version 1.0) running in environment 'example.gimp_env@0.1'. The task uses real images from Unsplash (photo IDs photo-1441974231531-c6227db76b6e and photo-1506905925346-21bda4d32df4) with fallback synthetic generation. Success requires meeting at least 3 of 4 criteria: (1) saturation increase of ≥15% relative or ≥0.08 absolute, (2) hue shift <5 degrees, (3) ≥10% colored pixels in image, and (4) ≥5% pixels changed significantly. Both verified Unsplash images contain sufficient color data (mean saturation 0.503 and 0.313 respectively) for meaningful saturation enhancement detection.
